亨爾氏環內有高濃度的草酸鈣引發局部發炎

從interstitium 穿破到urothelium, 成為一個錨點(nidus)

最常見的位置為renal pelvis和posterior lower pole calyx
結構上renal pelvis較長且前傾、UPJ高位、上段輸尿管須跨過isthmus所以導致urine stasis而結石
1.5cm以下非lower pole結石可以SWL或URS，SWL在馬蹄腎中比正常腎臟，需要更多次的治療次數，且須排除UPJO。
2cm以上者最佳為PCNL，且治療結果與正常腎臟差不多，最常為從posterior upper calyx進入，因腎臟位置前傾且向內，建議有術前CT評估，通常在12th rib下，故鮮少需要supracostal access，肋膜損傷為罕見。
補充：horseshoe kidney常常合併出現的異常
女性：Bicornuate uterus and, a septate vagina,

Summary of evidence
LE
For decompression of the renal collecting system, ureteral stents and
percutaneous nephrostomy catheters are equally effective.
1b
Recommendations
Strength rating
Urgently decompress the collecting system in case of sepsis with
obstructing stones, using percutaneous drainage or ureteral stenting.
Strong
Delay definitive treatment of the stone until sepsis is resolved.
Strong
Collect (again) urine for antibiogram test following decompression.
Strong
Start antibiotics immediately (+ intensive care, if necessary).
Strong
Re-evaluate antibiotic regimen following antibiogram findings.
Strong

text: 鈥(Holium)雷射為2100nm, 2.1μm, highly absorbed by water
Pulse duration: 250 to 350 microseconds, duration越長越不會push back
雷射碎石的效應為photothermal effect + Moses effect
Photothermal effect: direct light energy absorption by stone surfaces (“photo”) -> rapid temperature increases(“thermal”)  ->heat diffusion(最主要)
Moses effect: occurs by the rapid vaporization of fluid creating a vapor channel between the fiber tip and stone surface, allowing for more direct energy transfer.(其次的)
Laser fibres: vary in diameter from 200 to 360µm, 選越大口徑的laser, energy density越低越不會push back, 但越大口徑flexibility越低
Laser tip前面3mm的水會吸收到熱但只有0.5到1mm會受到thermal injury
鈥雷射能擊碎任何成分的結石，成功率可達100%，結石清除率95%，穿孔與狹窄的比率分別是1.1% 和 1.2%
在體外不小心近距離誤擊眼晴,最可能傷害的組織為何? Cornea

text: URS/RIRS/PCNL的體內碎石裝置Pneumatic lithotripsy 氣震式碎石機
原理: 碎石機的probe直接接觸石頭傳遞震波到石頭上導致碎裂
氣震式比較不會造成輸尿管穿孔，平均而言，穿孔機會少於 1%，因為碎石時不會產熱，所以黏膜的熱傷害也減到最低
氣震式碎石機的另外一個優點是相對便宜與低維修率，雖然機器比水電波貴，但是沒有拋棄式衛材的費用，而且探頭壽命較長
缺點是探頭屬硬的材質、需要直的工作通道、硬式輸尿管鏡以及斜角的接目鏡，而且氣震式碎石機有比較高的結石回推率 17%
常用於PCNL, URSSM已少用因為結石回推率高

text: URS/RIRS/PCNL的體內碎石裝置Electrohydraulic lithotripsy水電波碎石機
